/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_pdsch_processor.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_pdsch_processor.dir/factories.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pdsch_processor.dir/pdsch_block_processor_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pdsch_processor.dir/pdsch_block_processor_hw_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pdsch_processor.dir/pdsch_encoder_hw_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pdsch_processor.dir/pdsch_encoder_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pdsch_processor.dir/pdsch_modulator_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pdsch_processor.dir/pdsch_processor_flexible_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pdsch_processor.dir/pdsch_processor_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_pdsch_processor.dir/pdsch_processor_validator_impl.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_pdsch_processor.a
